app.name: daily.dev App Suite
app.one_liner: A monorepo housing the daily.dev web application and browser extension with shared components and tooling.

screens.name: Main Feed
screens.purpose: Display personalized developer news feed with consistent experience across web and extension.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user-saved articles to local or remote storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Initialize web and extension scaffolds
week 1: Set up pnpm workspace with shared components
acceptance_tests: Code quality is enforced via shared ESLint configuration.
User can view the same feed on both web and extension platforms.
